nasb.text: And when a man came near to prostrate himself before him, he would put out his hand and take hold of him and kiss him.

esv.text: And whenever a man came near to pay homage to him, he would put out his hand and take hold of him and kiss him.

cnv.text: 如果有人走近押沙龍要拜他，他就伸手拉住他，並且與他親吻。

ccb.text: 每当有人要向他叩拜，他都伸手扶他，亲吻他。
